title: Load Testing LLM APIs — Why k6 and Locust Lie

questions.question: What is the GIL trap in Locust-based LLM load testing?
options: Client-side tokenization runs under the Python GIL and queues behind request generation, inflating reported inter-token latency
questions.question_zh: 基于 Locust 做 LLM 压测时的 GIL 陷阱是什么？
options_zh: Locust 仅在 Windows 上能跑
客户端 tokenization 跑在 Python GIL 下，会和请求生成抢锁，把上报的 inter-token 延迟拉高

questions.question: What is the prompt-uniformity trap?
options: Uniform prompts always slow the server down
Sampling from a real distribution under-represents long prompts
Looping the same prompt makes prefix caching look like full concurrent decode, inflating reported throughput
options_zh: 统一 prompt 总会让服务端变慢
从真实分布采样会让长 prompt 被低估
统一 prompt 需要流式
循环用同一条 prompt 会让 prefix caching 看上去像满并发的 decode，把上报的吞吐拉高

questions.question: Which four load patterns does the lesson recommend?
questions.question_zh: 本课推荐哪四种负载模式？

questions.question: How does the lesson recommend building a realistic prompt distribution?
options: Sample from a real distribution using mean and stddev (for example LLMPerf's --mean-input-tokens / --stddev-input-tokens) or replay real traffic
Always use the same prompt to maximize cache hits
questions.question_zh: 本课建议怎么构造一份贴近真实的 prompt 分布？
options_zh: 用 mean 和 stddev 从真实分布采样（例如 LLMPerf 的 --mean-input-tokens / --stddev-input-tokens），或者直接回放真实流量
手写 5 条 prompt 然后乱序
始终用同一条 prompt 来最大化缓存命中

questions.question: Which 2026 tool combination is positioned as best for CI/CD SLA gates and Kubernetes-native distributed runs?
options: k6 v2026.1.0 with the k6 Operator 1.0 GA (TestRun / PrivateLoadZone CRDs)
questions.question_zh: 2026 年哪个工具组合被定位为最适合 CI/CD SLA 卡门以及 Kubernetes 原生分布式跑测试？
options_zh: k6 v2026.1.0 加上 k6 Operator 1.0 GA（TestRun / PrivateLoadZone CRD）

questions.question: Which failure mode does the soak load pattern catch?
options: Memory leaks, connection-pool drift, and observability overflow over hours
questions.question_zh: soak 负载模式能抓到哪种失败模式？
options_zh: 数小时内的内存泄漏、连接池漂移和可观测性溢出
